topic.title: Product Name or Description
topic.description: The household product to review. Can be a product name, brand and model, or a general description.

language.title: Language
language.description: Output language. Use 'en' for English or 'th' for Thai.

product_category.title: Product Category
product_category.description: The household product category to tailor the review angle.

review_angle.title: Review Angle
review_angle.description: The storytelling perspective for the review.

storytelling_style.title: Storytelling Style
storytelling_style.description: The narrative structure for the review. Leave empty for random selection.

include_pricing.title: Include Pricing Info
include_pricing.description: Whether to include approximate pricing and value-for-money assessment.

word_count.title: Maximum words (optional)
word_count.description: If provided, the review must not exceed this word count. Overrides length preset.

output_format.title: Output Format
output_format.description: Preferred output format. Markdown uses headings and formatting. Plain text is optimized for text-to-speech.

product_specs.title: Product Specifications (optional)
product_specs.description: Describe the product's real specifications, features, materials, and characteristics. The review will be based on these facts to prevent inaccurate claims.

reference_images.title: Product Images
reference_images.description: Optional product images. When provided, the review will be based on visual analysis of the actual product shown.

response_mode.title: Response Mode
response_mode.description: Choose 'markdown' for readable text or 'cms_json' for structured CMS output.

disclosure_type.title: Disclosure Type
disclosure_type.description: Disclosure about the review relationship with the product.

price_thb.title: Price (THB)
price_thb.description: Product price in Thai Baht for value assessment.

price_checked_at.title: Price Checked Date
price_checked_at.description: Date when the price was last verified.
